title: Amtech B1200 300mm (12") Water Pump Plier
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This 300mm (12") water pump plier is made from drop forged and heat treated steel for durability
COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: With matt grip sleeves for a comfort grip, it has serrated gripping jaws and an easily adjustable slip joint
PRACTICAL SIZE: 300mm length provides reach and stability.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.
